message:
feat(store): emit 'expired' keyspace notification on lazy key expiry

When drop_if_expired() removes an expired key, it now calls
notify_keyspace_event(NOTIFY_EXPIRED, "expired", key, 0) to emit
the proper keyspace/keyevent notification through the pub/sub system.

This matches Redis's behavior where expired keys generate events
on __keyspace@0__:<key> and __keyevent@0__:expired channels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
